hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo "[RAPPEL] Lance /pre-commit avant de committer/pusher : tests + traductions + api-contract."; fi; exit 0
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'backend/.*[.]py$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && python -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || true; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '[.]py$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && ruff check --fix --select I001,F401 "$FILE" 2>&1 || true; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/models/[^/]+[.]py$'; then echo "[SCHEMA] Modele SQLAlchemy modifie - lance /schema-impact puis /migrate."; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/(routers|routes|controllers)/[^/]+[.]py$'; then echo "[API] Route backend modifiee - lance /api-contract."; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.jsx|*.tsx) echo "[I18N] Composant React modifie - lance /translations.";; esac
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(requirements[.]txt|pyproject[.]toml|package[.]json)$'; then echo "[DEPS] Dependances modifiees - lance /deps."; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/tests?/'; then echo "[TEST] Fichier de test modifie - pense a lancer /test."; fi
